objective:

from pathlib import Path
import json
p = Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')
p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
p.write_text('name: GCI\n\non:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\njobs:\n  disabled:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - run: echo disabled\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
state = Path('governance/state/P13I_RUN_SCRIPT_NEWLINE_SAFE_OVERWRITE.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P13I','trace_id':'p13i_run_script_newline_safe_overwrite','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'change':'Run script newline pattern Path.write_text full overwrite of active workflow','next':'P13J remote raw verification'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8').rstrip() + '\n## P13I completed | 2026-06-04\nRun script newline pattern used with Path.write_text full overwrite of active workflow. Release PASS false pending remote raw verification. Next: P13J remote raw verification.\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(ctx))
